channel.title: Retrieval on Research Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Retrieval on Research Portfolio

item.title: PEFT Defense Agent and Real-Time Output Gating Under Adversarial Retrieval
item.description:
Problem

Placeholder: adversarial retrieval corruption and need for real-time gating without losing task utility.

Why the problem is hard

Placeholder: why discriminating safe vs. unsafe states from (query, context) and gating in real time are challenging.

System design

Placeholder: PEFT SFT on (query, context) → classifier → output gating layer.

Architecture diagram

Implementation details

Placeholder: PEFT setup, training data, gating logic, corruption scenarios.

Experiments

Placeholder: attack success with/without gating, task accuracy under corruption, latency.
